2606.21177.title: Anatomically Consistent TMJ Disc Segmentation via Semantic Anchoring and Clinical Priors
2606.21177.paper_summary: Segmenting the temporomandibular joint (TMJ) disc from MRI is essential for accurate diagnosis of internal derangement, yet it remains unreliable in practice due to its small size, low contrast, and morphological variability. Existing methods, primarily adapted from general segmentation architectures, often produce fragmented or anatomically inconsistent masks, leading to unstable measurements of disc position and shape for downstream diagnosis. To address these challenges, we propose TISC, a TMJ disc segmentation framework that integrates semantic anchoring with clinical metadata-guided boundary refinement. The framework first establishes robust disc localization in the foundation model feature space via a Prototypical Semantic Anchoring (PSA) module that aggregates adjacent-slice MedDINOv3 features and derives a prototype-driven similarity map. It then performs targeted boundary refinement through a Clinical-Metadata Point Refinement (C-MPR) module, with point-wise predictions modulated by Mouth Open Limitation (MOL), a clinical indicator associated with disc displacement without reduction. On a large-scale cohort of 2,488 PD MRI volumes from 1,300 patients, our method achieves up to a 4.96 Dice improvement over strong baselines across diverse architectures, delivering more anatomically coherent and clinically reliable TMJ disc segmentation.
2606.21177.paper_summary_zh: 對於準確診斷內部損傷，從 MRI 中分割顳下頜關節 (TMJ) 磁碟是至關重要的，然而由於其小尺寸、低對比度和形態變異性，實際應用中仍然不可靠。現有的方法主要是從一般分割架構中改編而來，經常產生破碎或解剖學上不一致的面具，導致下游診斷中磁碟位置和形狀的測量不穩定。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了 TISC，一個 TMJ 磁碟分割框架，將語義錨定與臨床元數據引導的邊界細化相結合。該框架首先通過原型語義錨定 (PSA) 模塊，在基礎模型特徵空間中建立穩健的磁碟定位，該模塊聚合相鄰切片的 MedDINOv3 特徵並推導出原型驅動的相似性圖。然後，它通過臨床元數據點細化 (C-MPR) 模塊執行針對性的邊界細化，點對點的預測受到與無減少的磁碟位移相關的臨床指標——口腔開啟限制 (MOL) 的調節。在來自 1,300 名患者的 2,488 個 PD MRI 體積的大型隊列中，我們的方法在各種架構上實現了高達 4.96 的 Dice 改進，超越了強基準，提供了更具解剖一致性和臨床可靠性的 TMJ 磁碟分割。
2606.21177.author: Dayun Ju et.al.
2606.21177.authors: Dayun Ju, Chanyoung Kim, Sunyoung Jung, Hyo-Jung Jung, Chena Lee, Younjung Park, Seong Jae Hwang
